summary: The diff shows modifications to BaselCouplesLandingPage.tsx and ZurichCouplesLandingPage.tsx, but the actual content of the 'wieder zueinander finden' section text changes is not visible in the truncated diff. The truncated portions show only boilerplate/setup code (imports, SEO meta tags, Google Tag scripts, video event listeners) and do not include the JSX render section where the heading and body paragraphs would appear. It is therefore impossible to confirm whether the required text replacements were actually implemented. The project_state.json still lists AR-2 and AR-3 as 'pending', which further suggests the changes may not have been applied.

missing_requirements.requirement: On the Basel couples landing page, replace the heading and body text of the upper 'wieder zueinander finden' section with the specified content (heading: 'Klarheit fuer Ihre Partnerschaft gewinnen', three specified body paragraphs with correct German umlauts).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff for BaselCouplesLandingPage.tsx is truncated before the JSX render/return section where the heading and paragraph text would appear. The project_state.json shows AR-2 (REQ-1) still as 'pending'. There is no visible evidence that the text was changed.

missing_requirements.requirement: On the Zuerich couples landing page, replace the heading and body text of the upper 'wieder zueinander finden' section with the identical content as REQ-1.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff for ZurichCouplesLandingPage.tsx is truncated before the JSX render/return section where the heading and paragraph text would appear. The project_state.json shows AR-3 (REQ-2) still as 'pending'. There is no visible evidence that the text was changed.
